name: core_reply_floor
note: parity-time canary (1.01M on 07-09, 1.08M on 07-12); 0 on 07-12 in md:warehouse was the mid-repair copy bug this gate exists for

name: campaign_daily_fresh
sql: SELECT count(*) FROM core.campaign_daily WHERE date >= current_date - INTERVAL 2 DAY

name: sync_run_committed
sql: SELECT count(*) FROM core.sync_run WHERE status IN ('success','partial') AND phase_count >= 5 AND started_at >= now() - INTERVAL 30 HOUR

name: meetings_present
note: THE meetings truth table is non-trivially populated (38,358 on 07-12)

name: instantly_email_floor
note: irreplaceable email prose store, append-only system of record (379,081 on 07-12) — must never shrink
